raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I noticed a charge for a good/service I never puchased and never received on my citibank credit card. I immediated filed a dispute with citi. On XX/XX/year> I received notice of an adverse decision stating I was responsible, despite never having charged this or received any product. Citi stated a letter detailing their reasons was posted in my portal on the online website. No such letter exists. 

This had been my primary card where I charged $ XXXX to $ XXXX per month on an ongoing basis. No more. I have frozen the card and am going through subscriptions to move those transactions to Capital One. I won't do business with citi after this, not for shoe laces or a stick of gum. I am seeking to be made whole for the {$69.00} in fraudulent charges to this " XXXX '' outfit. 

Thank You.
